source: youtube-interviews/Top Crypto Trader Shares SECRET Session Strategies.md
content: Session Strategy - Core Concept: The 24-hour crypto market has 4 sessions: Sydney (2:30 AM IST), Tokyo (5:30 AM IST), London (12:30 PM IST), New York (7:00 PM IST). Key insight: Only trade 2 sessions - Tokyo opening (5:30 AM) and New York opening (7:00 PM). These have the highest volatility and cleanest moves. Other sessions = noise and confusion. Tokyo close (1:30 PM IST) + US open (7:00 PM IST) = peak trading windows. Be available during ONLY these times. You don't need to watch charts 24 hours.

source: youtube-interviews/Top Crypto Trader Shares SECRET Session Strategies.md
content: Live Trade Example - Session Entry: August 27, ETH short at $4,600. Entry trigger: Fair Value Gap (FVG) created on August 27 at 12:45 PM (IST) = during Tokyo close window. FVG acts as resistance. Next day (August 28) = 1:30 PM (Tokyo close time) = entry signal. Entry: Short at $4,600 area. Initial stop loss: 60 points above entry. Target: $4,000 (600 points = 1:10 risk-reward!). Result: Trade hit target. Key: FVG level + session timing = high probability setup.

source: youtube-interviews/Top Crypto Trader Shares SECRET Session Strategies.md
content: Fair Value Gap (FVG): When a strong candle creates a gap between its body and adjacent candle's body = Fair Value Gap. FVGs act as future support/resistance. Bearish FVG (gap down from strong bearish candle) = resistance for future price bounces. Bullish FVG (gap up from strong bullish candle) = support for future price dips. Price returns to fill these gaps ~80% of time. Use FVGs for entry refinement after trend direction confirmed.

source: youtube-interviews/Top Crypto Trader Shares SECRET Session Strategies.md
content: Volume Profile + Delta: Multi-Layer Volume Profile = cumulative volume at each price level. Horizontal lines = high volume nodes (HVN) where most trading happened. Average line = point of control. When delta (difference between buy/sell volume) is negative = sellers dominating. When delta positive = buyers dominating. If price is below average line and delta negative = strong bearish signal. When HVN line shifts downward = sellers gaining strength. If delta turns positive but price below average = potential reversal signal.

source: youtube-interviews/Top Crypto Trader Shares SECRET Session Strategies.md
content: Complete Session + Indicator Strategy: 1) Plot Session indicator: Shows Tokyo (black) and US (red) sessions only. 2) Double AI Super Trend on 4H: Green = bullish, Red = bearish. Plot as colored dots. When dots turn red on 4H = bearish trend change confirmed. 3) Multi-Layer Volume Profile on 1H: Shows high volume nodes. Use delta to gauge buyer/seller pressure. 4) Fair Value Gap indicators plotted automatically. Entry: When Super Trend turns red on 4H + price at Volume Profile resistance + during Tokyo close or US open window = SHORT entry. Opposite for LONG.

source: youtube-interviews/Top Crypto Trader Shares SECRET Session Strategies.md
content: Trade Management Rules: 1) Enter with pre-planned SL and target - no winging it. 2) When trade goes in your favor (1:1 R:R), move SL to breakeven (cost-to-cost). 3) If price reaches strong support level below your short = hold, don't exit just because price is at support. 4) If price breaks below the support level (good profit), trail SL to new resistance above. 5) For swing trades during weekend: Hold through weekend - reduced volatility means cleaners moves on Monday. 6) Target 1:10 R:R when possible (60 point SL, 600 point target). Patience required.

source: youtube-interviews/Top Crypto Trader Shares SECRET Session Strategies.md
content: Triple Confirmation Entry Rule: Enter ONLY when 3 indicators agree: 1) Double AI Super Trend (4H): Must be Red for short / Green for long. 2) Volume Profile Delta: Must be negative (sellers dominate) for shorts. 3) Session timing: Must be during Tokyo close (1:30 PM) or US open (7:00 PM). All 3 = valid entry. Any 2 out of 3 = wait. This filtering eliminates ~70% of low-probability trades. Backtesting this strategy showed 80%+ win rate in 2 months (June-July challenge).

source: youtube-interviews/Top Crypto Trader Shares SECRET Session Strategies.md
content: 500→$10,000 Challenge Results: Started with $500 in June. By end of July (2 months): Account reached ~$12,000 (20x return). Only 19-25 trades in 2 months (not overtrading). Average 11-12 trades per month. Market is 24/7/365 - yet they made only 11 trades per month. Quality over consistency. Most profits came from big swing moves, not scalping. Key: Even with 15% drawdown periods, consistency wins through compounding.

source: youtube-interviews/Top Crypto Trader Shares SECRET Session Strategies.md
content: Taxation Notes (India/CA perspective): Crypto profits taxed at 30% in India. Also 1% TDS on transactions. Plan trades around tax implications. Short-term and long-term both taxed at 30% (no distinction like stocks). Losses CANNOT be offset against other income in India - only against crypto profits. Keep detailed records of all trades for tax filing.

source: youtube-interviews/Top Crypto Trader Shares SECRET Session Strategies.md
content: BTC Long-Term Levels (from backtesting): BTC all-time high: $111,000 area. Key insight: Even in massive bull runs, BTC spent only a few days at ATH before pulling back. Most of the time price is below ATH. This means the real money is made in the 'grind up', not at the top. For long-term holders: Buy at lower levels and wait. Don't chase ATH breakouts without confirmation. In 2017: BTC went from $3K to $69K (ATH), then crashed 84% to $15K, then went to $110K+. Patient holders who didn't panic = massive gains.
